substrate_authoritative_note: View filters lake.lda_contributions filings to those whose contribution_items text contains 'khanna' OR 'c00503185' (Ro for Congress principal committee FEC ID) OR 'c00392100'. Per s11 addendum dig-deeper landing: (i) within-view per-item aggregation requires the same three-token filter at the jsonb_array_elements grain, NOT a naive sum across all items in matching filings (which would over-count $63M / 13K lines across all 53 registrants' non-Khanna contributions); (ii) the view itself uses column 'registrant' (not 'registrant_name') and stores 'contribution_items' as text (not jsonb directly), requiring explicit ::jsonb cast.

top_registrants_by_sum.registrant_name: PHARMACEUTICAL RESEARCH AND MANUFACTURERS OF AMERICA
UNITED BROTHERHOOD OF CARPENTERS AND JOINERS OF AMERICA
HUMANE WORLD ACTION FUND AND AFFILIATES (FORMERLY KNOWN AS HUMANE SOCIETY LEGISLATIVE FUND)

drift_class_explanation: PASS_WITH_DEFECT/substrate_count_drift. The body's $299,198 / 147-line / 53-registrant figure was authored at an earlier lake.lda_contributions substrate state; the current snapshot reproduces 53-unique-LDA-registrant BIT-EXACT (load-bearing per F1135 wave-19 verification) with line-item count and aggregate amount lower because the view's underlying lake table grew between body-author and current-snapshot dates. Per fact-store provenance, the 53-registrant invariant is the load-bearing scalar per F500 / F899 / F1135 (LDA-203 cohort). The line-item and aggregate-amount drift is documented and acknowledged.

load_bearing_invariant.rationale: Body cites 53 unique LDA-registered organizations at Count 5 paragraph 44 + Anticipated Response #4. F1135 wave-19 verification BIT-EXACT-confirmed this scalar.
